data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Measures to safeguard against distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Use of Google Cloud Shield to block malicious traffic.

data.title: Content Moderation
data.description: AI-based tools to detect and remove inappropriate content.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models trained on large datasets for pattern recognition.

data.title: User Privacy Controls
data.description: Features and policies to protect user data and privacy in compliance with regulations.
data.technical_spec: GDPR compliance, user consent mechanisms, and data protection protocols.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular security assessments and patch management.
data.technical_spec: Integration of automated scanning tools and manual penetration testing.

data.title: Authentication and Authorization
data.description: Robust systems to ensure secure user logins and permissions.
data.technical_spec: Two-factor authentication and OAuth 2.0 based authorization.
